title: Thenmerku Paruva Kaatru Lyrics Karuthamma
stanzas: <div>Thenmerku Paruva Kaatru Song Lyrics Karuthamma

[thenmerku paruvakatru
thaeni pakkam veesum podhu
saaral inba saaral

themmaangu paadikondu
silu siluvena sindhuthamma
thooral muththu thooral

vengaattu pakkak  kalli
sattendru mottuvida
sengaattu chilli chedi
sillendra poovedukka ] (2)

thenmerku paruvakatru
thaeni pakkam veesum podhu
saaral inba saaral

vaanoadum mannodum
illaadha vannangal
pennodum kannodum
naan kaangiren

thaalaattil illaadha
sangeetha saarangal
paaraattum un paattil
naan ketkiren

mazhai thuli enna
thavam thaan seidhadho
malar konda maarbodu
thottaaduthe

mazhai thuli thotta
idam nee theendavo
ninaikkayil ulloora
kalloorudhe

thenmerku paruvakatru
thaeni pakkam veesum podhu
saaral inba saaral

themmaangu paadikondu
silu siluvena sindhuthamma
thooral muththu thooral

vengaattu pakkak  kalli
sattendru mottuvida
sengaattu chilli chedi
sillendra poovedukka

thenmerku paruvakatru
thaeni pakkam veesum podhu
saaral inba saaral

themmaangu paadikondu
silu siluvena sindhuthamma
thooral muththu thooral

Nee endrum naan endrum
iru vaarthai ondraagi
naam endra or vaarthai
unndaanathe

aanendrum pen endrum
iru varthai undraagi
aal endra or vaarthai
undaanathe

kadhal endra mandhirathin
maayam enna
kallum mullum ippodhu
poovaanadhe

vaanavillain thundondru
mannil vandhu
yaarukkum sollaamal
pennaanathe.

[thenmerku paruvakatru
thaeni pakkam veesum podhu
saaral inba saaral

themmaangu paadikondu
silu siluvena sindhuthamma
thooral muththu thooral

vengaattu pakkak kalli
sattendru mottuvida
sengaattu chilli chedi
sillendra poovedukka ] (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the beauty of nature and relationships.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Karuthamma, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings and the romantic moments shared with their beloved.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the melodious voices of K.S. Chithra and Unnikrishnan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Thenmerku Paruva Kaatru was composed by the renowned A.R. Rahman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 3, 1994.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thenmerku Paruva Kaatru, the lyrical beauty and melodic charm come together to create a heartfelt expression of love. Set against the backdrop of Karuthamma, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing, beautifully portraying the emotions of the characters. The soothing voices of K.S. Chithra and Unnikrishnan enhance the song's romantic essence, making it a timeless classic. This melody not only captivates the listeners but also resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thenmerku Paruva Kaatru from Karuthamma is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of K.S. Chithra and Unnikrishnan, this song beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu and the magical composition of A.R. Rahman. Experience the soothing vibes that make this classic a timeless favorite.
stanzaMeanings: When the gentle breeze from the south blows, it brings sweet joy.
With a soft voice, I sing and think of you, my dear, like pearls falling softly.
The flower blooms brightly, and the red chili dances in the breeze.
When the gentle breeze from the south blows, it brings sweet joy.
I see colors that don't exist in the sky or in my mind, nor in the eyes of women.
I listen to your song, which has no musical notes.
What penance did the raindrop perform? It falls when the flower blooms.
Did you come to the place where the raindrop falls? It is a thought in my mind.
When the gentle breeze from the south blows, it brings sweet joy.
With a soft voice, I sing and think of you, my dear, like pearls falling softly.
The flower blooms brightly, and the red chili dances in the breeze.
When the gentle breeze from the south blows, it brings sweet joy.
With a soft voice, I sing and think of you, my dear, like pearls falling softly.
You and I are one word, and that word is our bond.
Man and woman are one word, and that word is our bond.
The magic of love is like a flower blooming now, with thorns and all.
In the sky, there is no thunder, and no one can say anything about it.
When the gentle breeze from the south blows, it brings sweet joy.
With a soft voice, I sing and think of you, my dear, like pearls falling softly.
The flower blooms brightly, and the red chili dances in the breeze.
